text:
Mummified Right Arm (, Sekibo Maisō-hin no Mīra Migiude—lit. "Mummy Right Arm of Stone Grave Burial") is a mummified right arm from a tomb in Egypersia. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 8, Chapter 70 

Background

It is one of the requested items for the Nostrade bodyguard applicants to obtain. 

Plot

Yorknew City arc

Basho manages to acquire the Mummified Right Arm, which allows him to be hired as a bodyguard. 

Trivia

The name of the Mummified Right Arm is transliterated as "The right arm of an Egyptian mummy" in Crunchyroll's version/translation Hunter × Hunter - Episode 39 (2011) and as "The right arm of a mummy from the tombs of Egypsha" in the 1999 anime adaptation (subtitled version). Hunter × Hunter - Episode 48 (1999)
